metadata.description: Environment name used for resource naming (e.g., dev, prod).
Entra ID tenant id used by the API.
Entra API app registration client id (audience).
Object id of the Entra group/user that will be SQL Entra admin (break-glass).
Display name of the Entra SQL admin principal.
GitHub repo in owner/repo form for OIDC federated credentials.
GitHub OIDC subjects to federate. Default: main + prod environment.
Spoke VNet address space. Must not overlap the hub. Coordinate with platform team.
Resource id of the hub VNet in the connectivity subscription. When non-empty, spoke peers to hub.
Private IP of the hub Azure Firewall. When non-empty, ACA + PE subnets force 0.0.0.0/0 through it (ALZ forced tunneling).
Use hub VNet remote gateway (ExpressRoute / VPN) for on-prem connectivity.
Resource id of the RG holding central Private DNS zones (in connectivity sub). When non-empty, zones are not created locally.
Deploy an in-VNet self-hosted GitHub Actions runner (KEDA ACA Job). Strongly recommended in ALZ mode so CI can reach private endpoints.
GitHub owner (org or user) the runner registers to.
GitHub repository name. Leave empty to register at org scope.
GitHub App id for runner registration tokens. Required when deployGitHubRunner=true.
GitHub App installation id. Required when deployGitHubRunner=true.
Key Vault secret name that holds the GitHub App PEM private key. Populated out-of-band before first runner execution.
Key Vault secret name for a GitHub PAT (classic, repo+workflow scopes). Set to "github-runner-pat" to enable PAT-based runner registration when App credentials are not available.
Self-hosted runner labels (comma-separated) appended to "self-hosted, linux".
Image tag to deploy. Use "placeholder" (default) for first-time infrastructure bootstrap. Set to a real ACR tag (e.g. "latest") to deploy app images and configure ACR pull credentials.

Key Vault secret URI of the App Gateway TLS certificate. When set, enables HTTPS (443) listener and HTTP→HTTPS redirect. Format: https://kv-xxx.vault.azure.net/secrets/cert-name — use the create-tls-cert.ps1 script to generate one.
Spoke VNet address space (CIDR). Coordinate with the platform team to avoid hub overlap.
Private IP of the hub Azure Firewall. When non-empty, a route table forces 0.0.0.0/0 through it on workload subnets (ALZ forced tunneling).
Workload VNet resource id (used only in standalone mode).
Azure region for ACA env zone (regional).
Resource id of the resource group that hosts the central Private DNS zones (typically in the connectivity subscription). When empty, zones are created locally.
Spoke (workload) VNet name in this resource group.
Resource id of the hub VNet (in the connectivity subscription).
Allow traffic from hub VNet to be forwarded through the spoke (default false).
Use the hub VNet remote gateway (ExpressRoute / VPN). Requires gateway in hub.
GitHub repo in owner/repo form, e.g. OdayAlUlabi/Stocky.
Resource token (lowercase) for uniqueness of globally-scoped names.
Private DNS zone id for vaultcore.
Private DNS zone id for database.windows.net.
Object id of the Entra group/user that will be SQL Entra admin (break-glass).
Display name of the Entra admin principal.
Private DNS zone id for azurecr.io.
Self-hosted GitHub runner identity principal id.
App Gateway identity principal id (reads TLS cert from Key Vault).
User-assigned identity resource id for ACR pull + workload identity.
User-assigned identity client id (for SQL connection string).
App Gateway public FQDN used for CORS AllowedOrigins.
Image tag (sha) — placeholder allowed so CI updates it later.

env.name: ConnectionStrings__Sql
env.value: [format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Database={1};Authentication=Active Directory Managed Identity;User Id={2};Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', parameters('sqlServerFqdn'), parameters('sqlDbName'), parameters('apiIdentityClientId'))]

env.name: ConnectionStrings__Sql
env.value: [format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Database={1};Authentication=Active Directory Managed Identity;User Id={2};Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=60;', parameters('sqlServerFqdn'), parameters('sqlDbName'), parameters('migratorIdentityClientId'))]

metadata.description: ACR login server (the runner image is pulled from here).
GitHub owner/repo or owner (org) the runner registers to.
GitHub repository name (leave empty to register at org scope).
GitHub App id used to obtain installation tokens. Leave empty to use PAT mode.
GitHub App installation id for the target org/repo. Leave empty to use PAT mode.
Key Vault secret name that holds the GitHub App PEM private key.
Runner image (default: ephemeral runner image to be pushed to ACR).

When true, swaps the runner image for a public MCR sample so first-provision succeeds before the real runner image has been pushed to ACR. Set to false once the runner image has been built and pushed.
Runner labels appended to "self-hosted, linux". Jobs target these via runs-on.

rules.name: github-runner
rules.metadata: [if(variables('useAppAuth'), createObject('owner', parameters('githubOwner'), 'runnerScope', if(empty(parameters('githubRepo')), 'org', 'repo'), 'repos', if(empty(parameters('githubRepo')), '', parameters('githubRepo')), 'labels', parameters('runnerLabels'), 'applicationID', parameters('githubAppId'), 'installationID', parameters('githubInstallationId'), 'targetWorkflowQueueLength', '1'), createObject('owner', parameters('githubOwner'), 'runnerScope', if(empty(parameters('githubRepo')), 'org', 'repo'), 'repos', if(empty(parameters('githubRepo')), '', parameters('githubRepo')), 'labels', parameters('runnerLabels'), 'targetWorkflowQueueLength', '1'))]

containers.name: runner
containers.env: [if(variables('useAppAuth'), createArray(createObject('name', 'ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET_REF', 'value', variables('credSecretName')), createObject('name', 'APP_ID', 'value', parameters('githubAppId')), createObject('name', 'APP_INSTALLATION_ID', 'value', parameters('githubInstallationId')), createObject('name', 'APP_PRIVATE_KEY', 'secretRef', variables('credSecretName')), createObject('name', 'REPO_OWNER', 'value', parameters('githubOwner')), createObject('name', 'REPO_NAME', 'value', parameters('githubRepo')), createObject('name', 'RUNNER_SCOPE', 'value', if(empty(parameters('githubRepo')), 'org', 'repo')), createObject('name', 'ORG_NAME', 'value', parameters('githubOwner')), createObject('name', 'LABELS', 'value', parameters('runnerLabels')), createObject('name', 'EPHEMERAL', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'DISABLE_AUTO_UPDATE', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('runnerIdentityClientId'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'ACCESS_TOKEN', 'secretRef', variables('credSecretName')), createObject('name', 'REPO_OWNER', 'value', parameters('githubOwner')), createObject('name', 'REPO_NAME', 'value', parameters('githubRepo')), createObject('name', 'RUNNER_SCOPE', 'value', if(empty(parameters('githubRepo')), 'org', 'repo')), createObject('name', 'ORG_NAME', 'value', parameters('githubOwner')), createObject('name', 'LABELS', 'value', parameters('runnerLabels')), createObject('name', 'EPHEMERAL', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'DISABLE_AUTO_UPDATE', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('runnerIdentityClientId'))))]

metadata.description: API container app FQDN (private, inside acaEnvDefaultDomain).
User-assigned managed identity resource ID for App Gateway to pull TLS cert from Key Vault.

Key Vault secret URI of the TLS certificate. When non-empty, enables the HTTPS (443) listener and redirects HTTP→HTTPS. Format: https://kv-xxx.vault.azure.net/secrets/cert-name (omit version for always-latest).

properties.httpListeners: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'listener-http', 'properties', createObject('frontendIPConfiguration', createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/applicationGateways/frontendIPConfigurations', variables('agwName'), 'feip-public')), 'frontendPort', createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/applicationGateways/frontendPorts', variables('agwName'), 'port-80')), 'protocol', 'Http'))), if(variables('httpsEnabled'), createArray(createObject('name', 'listener-https', 'properties', createObject('frontendIPConfiguration', createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/applicationGateways/frontendIPConfigurations', variables('agwName'), 'feip-public')), 'frontendPort', createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/applicationGateways/frontendPorts', variables('agwName'), 'port-443')), 'protocol', 'Https', 'sslCertificate', createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/applicationGateways/sslCertificates', variables('agwName'), 'tls-cert'))))), createArray()))]
properties.redirectConfigurations: [if(variables('httpsEnabled'), createArray(createObject('name', 'redirect-http-to-https', 'properties', createObject('redirectType', 'Permanent', 'targetListener', createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/applicationGateways/httpListeners', variables('agwName'), 'listener-https')), 'includePath', true(), 'includeQueryString', true()))), createArray())]
properties.requestRoutingRules: [if(variables('httpsEnabled'), createArray(createObject('name', 'http-to-https', 'properties', createObject('ruleType', 'Basic', 'priority', 50, 'httpListener', createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/applicationGateways/httpListeners', variables('agwName'), 'listener-http')), 'redirectConfiguration', createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/applicationGateways/redirectConfigurations', variables('agwName'), 'redirect-http-to-https')))), createObject('name', 'https-to-backends', 'properties', createObject('ruleType', 'PathBasedRouting', 'priority', 100, 'httpListener', createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/applicationGateways/httpListeners', variables('agwName'), 'listener-https')), 'urlPathMap', createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/applicationGateways/urlPathMaps', variables('agwName'), 'paths'))))), createArray(createObject('name', 'http-to-web', 'properties', createObject('ruleType', 'PathBasedRouting', 'priority', 100, 'httpListener', createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/applicationGateways/httpListeners', variables('agwName'), 'listener-http')), 'urlPathMap', createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/applicationGateways/urlPathMaps', variables('agwName'), 'paths'))))))]
